title: AquaCraft
description: Adds foods, weapons, tools, armors and ores!
body:
![Blocks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b994ac594802108a33a70f9cc222fd59fdeb697d.png)

![COMBAT](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/abc2d78d8c0b4a95196ab7d2cbdd2622a8ad6c80.png)

![CREATIVE TAB 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4369160a456736107da5824bd3056a4d1b53fd61.png)

![CREATIVE TAB 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ff05188c9a9f62ca89ae2f7d0d76fce5035dff0b.png)

AquaCraft is a mod that enhances your Minecraft experience with powerful new materials, tools, weapons, armor, and foods! Featuring exciting resources like Aquaridium and Firidium, along with advanced materials like Endirium and Ultimate, AquaCraft adds a range of fresh crafting possibilities to your world.

Key Features:

> Aquaridium & Firidium: Mine Aquaridium and Firidium, two new ores with unique properties. These ores can be used to craft powerful tools, weapons, and armor, giving you an edge as you explore and survive in your Minecraft world.

> Endirium & Ultimate: Endirium and Ultimate are high-tier materials that can be crafted into top-notch tools and armor. Endirium gear offers incredible durability and strength, while Ultimate gear is the ultimate in protection and performance, perfect for tackling the toughest challenges.

> Weapons & Tools: Craft a variety of specialized weapons and tools using Aquaridium, Firidium, Endirium, and Ultimate. From the Aquaridium Sword to the Ultimate Pickaxe, each item provides superior stats and durability for combat, mining, and more.

> Armor Sets: Equip yourself with powerful armor crafted from Aquaridium, Firidium, Endirium, and Ultimate. These armors offer excellent protection and useful buffs to help you survive and thrive in any environment.

> New Foods: AquaCraft introduces delicious new foods crafted from crops you can grow in your   world. Create a Sandwich or Sushi, both of which restore hunger and offer unique benefits. These foods provide variety and a fun way to enjoy the fruits of your labor in the kitchen!

With AquaCraft, you’ll experience an enhanced Minecraft world filled with new resources, powerful gear, and exciting foods. Whether you're crafting high-end tools, gearing up with legendary armor, or cooking up tasty treats, AquaCraft brings a fresh and thrilling experience to your gameplay.

Ready to dive into a world of new possibilities with Aquaridium, Firidium, Endirium, Ultimate, and delicious Sandwiches and Sushi? AquaCraft is here to take your Minecraft experience to the next level!
